microai-main-goal.description: Build the microai autonomous company and achieve a sustainable fully automated online revenue loop
success_criteria: Ship at least one automated online monetization path
Create a reusable operating SOP and weekly review workflow
Track measurable KPIs for traffic, conversion, revenue, and cost

microai-acquisition-goal.description: Build an automated customer acquisition funnel (content distribution + lead capture)
success_criteria: Publish and distribute content consistently each day

microai-monetization-goal.description: Build an automated monetization loop (offer, delivery, payment, retention)
success_criteria: Define standardized product and service packages
Automate order handling workflow end to end
Keep monthly gross margin positive and improving

microai-ops-goal.description: Establish operations dashboard and incident self-healing mechanisms
success_criteria: Expose key operating metrics in near real-time
Auto-alert and self-recover common operational failures
